description: Lane-scoped release risk taxonomy. Clean lane only counts risks that directly invalidate source/package/freshness/schema/full-suite/source-tree release meaning; learning and advisory lifecycle risks remain visible on their own lanes.

release_risk_taxonomy_unregistered_code.description: Release closeout emitted a risk code that is not registered in this taxonomy; machine-clean release is blocked until the code is classified.

bootstrap_preflight_failed.description: Bootstrap preflight did not pass, so the release environment evidence is not clean.

release_smoke_failed.description: Release smoke evidence did not pass.

release_smoke_boundedness_failed.description: Release smoke archive boundedness budget did not pass.

source_package_clean_extract_failed.description: Clean-extract source package checks did not pass.

external_report_reference_manifest_faile.description: External report reference manifest did not bind to the current strict release distribution.

external_report_strict_unavailable.description: Strict external report release check was unavailable because the closeout did not provide a current distribution ZIP.

test_summary_not_pass.description: Test execution summary did not report a pass status.

live_make_check_report_missing.description: Authoritative full-suite make-check evidence is missing.

live_make_check_not_pass.description: Authoritative full-suite make-check evidence did not report a pass status.

live_make_check_not_full_suite.description: Authoritative make-check evidence was not generated from the full-suite lane.

live_make_check_nodeid_outcome_mismatch.description: Authoritative full-suite evidence has a collected-nodeid/outcome mismatch.

live_make_check_toolchain_not_eligible.description: Authoritative full-suite evidence was produced by a toolchain that is not release-evidence eligible.

test_deselection_lifecycle_missing.description: Test execution summary is missing deselection lifecycle evidence.

test_deselection_release_blocking.description: A deselected test is explicitly marked release blocking.

test_deselection_acceptance_incomplete.description: A temporary test deselection is missing required acceptance metadata.

raw_registry_preflight_failed.description: Raw registry preflight failed and weakens release source trace.

raw_registry_preflight_warnings.description: Raw registry warnings can weaken release source trace and must prevent machine-clean release until revalidated or explicitly reviewed.

artifact_freshness_failed.description: Artifact freshness failed, so checked-in release evidence may be stale or inconsistent.

artifact_freshness_attention.description: Artifact freshness debt can make checked-in release evidence stale.

generated_index_unknown_status.description: Generated artifact index did not reach a pass or accepted attention status.

generated_index_archive_advisory.description: Generated artifact index archive candidates are lifecycle backlog when current generated artifacts are present and indexed.

source_tree_coherence_missing_fingerprin.description: Release closeout source reports are missing source-tree fingerprints.

source_tree_coherence_attention.description: Source-tree fingerprint divergence or report mtime drift prevents a strict clean release evidence cohort.

auto_improve_execution_not_ready.description: Auto-improve readiness cannot execute a trial and no structured promotion blocker explains the condition.

auto_improve_release_blocker.description: Auto-improve readiness emitted a generic release blocker.

promotion_blocked_by_artifact_contract_f.description: Auto-improve promotion is blocked because the checked-in artifact contract/freshness gate failed.

promotion_blocked_by_selected_contract_f.description: Auto-improve promotion is blocked because the selected contract test summary did not pass or was unavailable.

promotion_blocked_by_source_package_fail.description: Auto-improve promotion is blocked because source package clean-extract evidence did not pass or was unavailable.

promotion_blocked_by_release_closeout_su.description: Auto-improve promotion is blocked because the active release closeout summary gate is not machine-allowed; this is a downstream release-authority signal and must not self-block the source closeout clean lane.

promotion_blocked_by_release_batch_manif.description: Auto-improve promotion is blocked because the release batch manifest is not sealed clean; the sealed-distribution gate is evaluated after source closeout and must not self-block the source closeout clean lane.

promotion_blocked_by_release_authority_p.description: Auto-improve promotion is blocked because sealed release-authority preflight evidence is missing or not clean; this operator handoff gate is downstream of source closeout and must not self-block the source closeout clean lane.

promotion_blocked_by_release_finality_fa.description: Auto-improve promotion is blocked because release finality attestation is not pass; finality is a downstream release-authority signal and must not self-block the source closeout clean lane.

promotion_blocked_by_release_lineage_mis.description: Auto-improve promotion is blocked because release evidence cohort no longer represents a single strict source-tree lineage; this downstream lineage-integrity signal must not self-block the source closeout clean lane.

promotion_blocked_by_artifact_finalizati.description: Auto-improve promotion is blocked because post-check artifact finalization evidence is missing or found refresh-required drift; this downstream release-authority signal must not self-block the source closeout clean lane.

execution_blocked_by_no_runnable_proposa.description: Auto-improve execution is blocked because no runnable proposal is available.

learning_blocked_by_execution_not_runnab.description: Learning readiness is not runnable because execution has no runnable proposal; this blocks live auto-improve readiness and learning claims without blocking source package release.

test_deselection_accepted_risk.description: Structured test deselection means full-suite release evidence is not machine-clean until the deselection is removed.

learning_blocked_by_review_required.description: Learning readiness review blocks machine learning improvement claims without blocking source package clean release when no learning improvement is claimed.

sbom_readiness_gate_failed.description: SBOM readiness gate did not pass.
